description_long: This garlic bulb features a rounded, slightly flattened base with a cluster of plump cloves encased in a thin, papery white skin. The bulb is partially split open, revealing the inner cloves and their layered arrangement. The outer skin is mostly intact but shows some peeling, especially near the opening. The stem remnant at the top is elongated, dry, and fibrous, extending upward and slightly fanned apart. Subtle pinkish and beige hues are visible beneath the white skin, adding to the natural coloration. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, with visible ridges and folds typical of garlic bulbs.
description: A partially split garlic bulb with plump cloves, papery white skin, and a dry, elongated stem remnant. Subtle pinkish hues and a rough, matte surface are visible.
description_view_0: The garlic bulb is shown with a prominent split, exposing several inner cloves and the layered structure beneath the papery skin.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the bulb with the split more visible, showing the depth of the opening and the texture of the exposed cloves.
description_view_2: The bulb appears mostly intact from this angle, with the papery skin covering the cloves and the stem remnant extending upward.
description_view_3: A rear view of the bulb, showing the rounded, unbroken surface and the continuation of the stem remnant at the top.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb is partially separated, with at least three distinct cloves visible in the split section. The segmentation is clear where the bulb is open, but the rest remains whole and covered.
attribute_clove_arrangement: The cloves are tightly packed in a circular, layered arrangement, radiating from the center. The exposed cloves show a regular, concentric pattern typical of garlic bulbs.
attribute_stem_remnant: present, elongated and dry, extending upward from the top of the bulb
